title: Parallel Items
description: Custom items for the SMP Parallel SMP
body:
This is the Official Parallel SMP mod that adds the 5 custom weapons.

# Weapons

1. **Conviction:**
The Mythical Blade can inflict Wither II for 3 seconds as well as give the user 2 additional hearts after three consecutive critical hits.
2. **Integrity:**
The mythical shield grants its user Resistance II on usage, and upon being broken summons a wind charge to push back an enemy. 
Shield breaks only last 3 seconds, instead of 5 seconds.
3. **Convergence:**
The mythical bow grants the user speed 1 consistently until the user unequips it, and each shot will hit its target if it means its trajectory has to change and even if there is a shield in the way. With the sole exception of Integrity.
4. **Perseverance:**
The mythical spear with the power to pierce any obstacle, it has the innate ability to push further beyond than normal limits (Lunge 5). The lower your health is, the more damage you do.
5. **Authority:**
The mythical mace grants the user the authority that detests the wills of even the most important beings, as to kneel is sin to their core value. 
Each normal mace hit gives the target slowness III for 3 secs and weakness II for 5 secs.

The texture pack is still being made.
